inputs.titre: L'équipe de France triomphe à la Coupe du monde de football en Russie

reason: The image depicts the French team celebrating their victory at the World Cup. The presence of modern smartphones and digital cameras in the hands of the crowd is anachronistic for a depiction focused on 'texture and atmosphere over identifiable faces, capturing the electric energy of the event without revealing any specific individuals'. Also, some of the t-shirts have clearly visible modern logos (like Nike swoosh). The stadium architecture seems plausible for the 21st century.
